<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sń≠ng-tiŇę]][[de:Metall-B√ľffel]][[hak:S√ģn-chhi√ļ]][[ja:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[ko:žč†ž∂ē]][[vi:T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thi√ļ]][[zh-yue:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[zh:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sń≠ng-tiŇę]][[de:Metall-B√ľffel]][[hak:S√ģn-chhi√ļ]][[ja:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[ko:žč†ž∂ē]][[vi:T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thi√ļ]][[zh-yue:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[zh:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sń≠ng-tiŇę]][[de:Metall-B√ľffel]][[hak:S√ģn-chhi√ļ]][[ja:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[ko:žč†ž∂ē]][[vi:T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u]][[za:Sincouj]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-thi√ļ]][[zh-yue:ŤĺõšłĎ]][[zh:ŤĺõšłĎ]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Ox|kanji=ŤĺõšłĎ|romaji=kanoto ushi|onyomi=shinchŇę|p=xńęnch«íu|w=hsin-ch'ou|mi=…ēin‚ĀĶ¬≥  ą ā įo äŐĮ|y=san1 chau2|j=san1 chau2|ci=s…źn ts į…źuŐĮ|mc=sin t ā įjuw|oc-bs=sin  ą ā įu Ē|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Ox''' (ŤĺõšłĎ) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 38th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Gengzi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|ŚļöŚ≠ź|1=Yang Metal Rat|lt=Gengzi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gengzi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Renyin|ja|1=Yang Water Tiger|2=ja|Ś£¨ŚĮÖ|lt=Renyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renyin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements philosophy|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the Heavenly Stem {{ill|Xin|ja|Ťĺõ|1=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|lt=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|2=ja|3=Ťĺõ|4=zh|5=Ťĺõ|1=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|qq=}} represents yin metal and the Earthly Branch {{ill|Chou|ja|šłĎ|1=ch«íu|lt=Ox (šłĎ)|2=ja|3=šłĎ|1=Ox (zodiac)|lt=Ox (šłĎ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chou|13=User:Immanuelle/Ox (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16539206}} represents yin earth; according to the theory of mutual generation (ŚúüÁĒüťáĎ) in the Five Elements philosophy, earth generates metal.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Ox (ŤĺõšłĎ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xńęnch«íu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: shinchu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinchuk (žč†ž∂ē)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u

<!--
==
* Yin Metal Ox (ŤĺõšłĎ) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xńęnch«íu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: „Āč„Āģ„Ā®„ĀÜ„Āó (kanoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: „Āó„āď„Āč„Āģ„ĀÜ„Āó (shinka-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: „Āó„āď„Ā°„āÖ„ĀÜ (shinchŇę)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinchuk
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u

-->
==Years of Yin Metal Ox==
A year is designated as a Yin Metal Ox year when the Western calendar year divided by 60 leaves a remainder of 41.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Yin Metal Ox'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 41|en|AD 41|WD=Q23777|lt=41 AD|1=AD 41}}
* {{ill|AD 101|en|AD 101|WD=Q24408|lt=101 AD|1=AD 101}}
* {{ill|161|en|161|WD=Q30277|lt=161 AD|1=161}}
* {{ill|221|en|221|WD=Q30320|lt=221 AD|1=221}}
* {{ill|281|en|281|WD=Q33533|lt=281 AD|1=281}}
* {{ill|341|en|341|WD=Q34061|lt=341 AD|1=341}}
* {{ill|401|en|401|WD=Q30479|lt=401 AD|1=401}}
* {{ill|461|en|461|WD=Q30828|lt=461 AD|1=461}}
* {{ill|521|en|521|WD=Q31436|lt=521 AD|1=521}}
* {{ill|581|en|581|WD=Q32247|lt=581 AD|1=581}}
* {{ill|641|en|641|WD=Q31676|lt=641 AD|1=641}}
* {{ill|701|en|701|WD=Q23496|lt=701 AD|1=701}}
* {{ill|761|en|761|WD=Q30514|lt=761 AD|1=761}}
* {{ill|821|en|821|WD=Q30615|lt=821 AD|1=821}}
* {{ill|881|en|881|WD=Q30382|lt=881 AD|1=881}}
* {{ill|941|en|941|WD=Q24255|lt=941 AD|1=941}}
|
* {{ill|1001|en|1001|WD=Q19219|lt=1001 AD|1=1001}}
* {{ill|1061|en|1061|WD=Q19387|lt=1061 AD|1=1061}}
* {{ill|1121|en|1121|WD=Q23983|lt=1121 AD|1=1121}}
* {{ill|1181|en|1181|WD=Q19704|lt=1181 AD|1=1181}}
* {{ill|1241|en|1241|WD=Q5436|lt=1241 AD|1=1241}}
* {{ill|1301|en|1301|WD=Q5610|lt=1301 AD|1=1301}}
* {{ill|1361|en|1361|WD=Q6159|lt=1361 AD|1=1361}}
* {{ill|1421|en|1421|WD=Q6213|lt=1421 AD|1=1421}}
* {{ill|1481|en|1481|WD=Q6631|lt=1481 AD|1=1481}}
* {{ill|1541|en|1541|WD=Q6516|lt=1541 AD|1=1541}}
* {{ill|1601|en|1601|WD=Q6725|lt=1601 AD|1=1601}}
* {{ill|1661|en|1661|WD=Q7005|lt=1661 AD|1=1661}}
* {{ill|1721|en|1721|WD=Q6913|lt=1721 AD|1=1721}}
* {{ill|1781|en|1781|WD=Q7719|lt=1781 AD|1=1781}}
* {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841 AD|1=1841}}
* {{ill|1901|en|1901|WD=Q2035|lt=1901 AD|1=1901}}
* {{ill|1961|en|1961|WD=Q3696|lt=1961 AD|1=1961}}
|
* {{ill|2021|en|2021|WD=Q49628|lt=2021 AD|1=2021}}
* {{ill|2081 AD|ja|2081ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2081 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2080ŚĻīšĽ£|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2141 AD|ja|2141ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2141 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22šłĖÁīÄ|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2201 AD|ja|2201ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2201 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23šłĖÁīÄ|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2261 AD|ja|2261ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2261 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23šłĖÁīÄ|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2321 AD|ja|2321ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2321 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24šłĖÁīÄ|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2381 AD|ja|2381ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2381 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2441 AD|ja|2441ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2441 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2501 AD|ja|2501ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2501 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2561 AD|ja|2561ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2561 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2621 AD|ja|2621ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2621 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2681 AD|ja|2681ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2681 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2741 AD|ja|2741ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2741 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2801 AD|ja|2801ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2801 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2861 AD|ja|2861ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2861 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2921 AD|ja|2921ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2921 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2981 AD|ja|2981ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2981 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Guangxu|ja|ŚÖČÁ∑í|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} 27th Year and {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 34th Year (1901 AD) ‚Äď The {{ill|Beijing Protocol|ja|ŤĺõšłĎŚíĆÁīĄ|lt=Beijing Protocol|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beijing Protocol|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ŚĆóšļ¨Ť≠įŚģöśõł|1=Boxer Protocol|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q672556}}, concerning the Boxer Rebellion (excluding Russia) among a coalition of 11 countries (including Austria, Britain, and France) and the Qing Empire, was signed.
==Months of Yin Metal Ox==
In a Western calendar year whose last digit is either 1 or 6 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Xin|ja|Ťĺõ|1=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|lt=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|2=ja|3=Ťĺõ|4=zh|5=Ťĺõ|1=Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (Ťĺõ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|šłô|1=Hinoe (šłô)|lt=Hinoe (šłô)|2=ja|3=šłô|4=zh|5=šłô|1=Hinoe (šłô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (šłô)|qq=}}), the month of December becomes the Yin Metal Ox month. (Note that here ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the old calendar or to a seasonal month defined from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Xiaohan|1=Xiaohan}} until the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}.)

==Days of Yin Metal Ox==
=== ťĀłśó• ===
The Yin Metal Ox day is the 9th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja|Ś§©šłÄŚ§©šłä|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tian Shang|ja_comment=Ś§©šłÄÁ•ě|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=Ś§©šłÄÁ•ě|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:K√≠-chh√°]]
[[zh-yue:Ś∑ĪŚ∑≥]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Ox|qq=ja|ŤĺõšłĎ|version=98658119|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:K√≠-cŠĻ≥ŐĄde]]
[[nds:Holt-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Metal Ox]]

[[ja:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
[[zh:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
[[ko:žč†ž∂ē]]
[[fr:Buffle de m√©tal]]
[[de:Metall-B√ľffel]]
[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Wood Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de boisboishak]]
[[it:Ki-chŠĻ≥ŐĀid]]

[[ko:Íłįžā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)]]
[[vi:KŠĽ∑ TŠĽĶ]]
[[za:Keiceij]]
[[zh:Ś∑ĪŚ∑≥]]
[[ar:Yin Metal Ox]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sń≠ng-tiŇę]]
[[hak:S√ģn-chhi√ļ]]
[[vi:T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u]]
[[za:Sincouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-thi√ļ]]
[[zh-yue:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalos (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sń≠ng-tiŇę]]
[[hak:S√ģn-chhi√ļ]]
[[vi:T√Ęn SŠĽ≠u]]
[[za:Sincouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-thi√ļ]]
[[zh-yue:ŤĺõšłĎ]]
{{wikidata link|Q904956}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
